description: Generate a JSON inventory of 'File' and 'Note' documents located in the 'Projects' workspace (/default-domain/workspaces/Projects) using the Nuxeo REST API (http://localhost:8080/nuxeo/api/v1). For each document, include the title (dc:title), type, path, creator (dc:creator), and created (dc:created) fields. Save the resulting JSON array to /home/ga/Documents/project_inventory.json. Credentials: Administrator / Administrator.
